title: Intermediate Portfolio & Roadmap
module_title: Portfolio Development and Advanced Skill Progression Planning
learning_objectives: Conduct honest self-assessment across all intermediate domains
Curate best mission outputs into portfolio artifacts
Develop specific advanced skill development plan
Update professional identity and career positioning
scenario: Consolidate learning before advancing. Build portfolio, assess skills, refine methodology, create advanced preparation plan.

scenario_context.setting: Reflection point between Intermediate and Advanced tracks
scenario_context.challenge: Honestly assess capabilities and plan advancement

subtasks.title: Skills Self-Assessment
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Rate proficiency (beginner/intermediate/advanced) across: reconnaissance, enumeration, exploitation, post-exploitation, privesc, web apps, AD, reporting. Document strengths and gaps.

subtasks.title: Portfolio Curation
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Select 5 best mission deliverables representing diverse skills. Write brief summaries highlighting key accomplishments and technical achievements.

subtasks.title: Methodology Refinement
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Create personal penetration testing checklist/framework incorporating lessons learned. Document phases, tools, techniques, and decision points.

subtasks.title: Advanced Preparation Plan
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Identify key skills for Advanced track. Create 3-month study plan with specific topics, resources, milestones, and estimated hours.

subtasks.title: Professional Identity Update
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Write updated professional summary reflecting Intermediate mastery. Define specialization goals and unique value proposition.

reflection_prompt: What has been your most significant learning from the Intermediate track? Where will you focus in the Advanced track? How has your understanding of offensive security evolved?

quiz.question: Why is honest self-assessment important at this progression point?
options: Identifies genuine gaps to inform advanced planning
quiz.explanation: Honest assessment of skills and gaps enables targeted advanced training, accelerating proficiency in weak areas.

quiz.question: What is the value of a personal methodology document?
options: Codifies your approach for consistency and improvement
quiz.explanation: Personal methodology provides consistency, enables refinement, and serves as foundation for advanced techniques.

mentor_notes: This mission is reflective and developmental. Assess honesty of self-assessment. Portfolio should represent best work. Preparation plan should be ambitious but achievable. Professional statement should demonstrate growth. Final stepping stone to Advanced track.
